name: Network Intrusion Detection/Prevention System
description: Deep packet inspection and network traffic analysis system deployed at national network boundaries and critical infrastructure nodes. Detects and blocks malicious traffic, command-and-control communications, and data exfiltration attempts.

specialAbilities.name: Deep Packet Inspection
specialAbilities.description: Analyzes network traffic at the application layer, identifying malicious payloads hidden in legitimate-looking communications.

specialAbilities.name: C2 Channel Blocking
specialAbilities.description: Identifies and severs command-and-control channels used by adversary malware, cutting off attacker access to compromised systems.
